title: Tanu's Food Mod
description: Adds kebab stuff to the game and much more.
body:
## Tanu's Kebab Mod – Simple mod for Fabric and Neo Forge!

**Features:**
1. llamas drop raw kebab

**Works:**
- Fabric: 1.21-1.21.10
- NeoForge: 1.21.1

**Language Support:**
- Fabric: finnish, english US
- NeoForge: english US

![fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e5bf78b0cb5c0aa53e4787ef7deef0fe0b6d599.webp) ![neoforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c52e8c02be3fdd667852b896468f00468aca4653.webp)
